title: PARACITY Water Jug Squama Designed 64 oz, High Borosilicate Glass Jug, Iced Tea Jug with Lid and Spout, Large Bore Design for Easy Cleaning, for Cold/Hot Drinks, Iced Tea, Juice, Milk
features: 【High Borosilicate Glass】The water jug is made of lead-free borosilicate glass, which can withstand temperatures from 0°F to 300°F, and is safe to use in refrigerators and stoves.

【Pot Lid with Large and Small Holes】The 304 stainless steel cover has two outlets, the large hole is used for pouring, and the small hole is used for filtering.The glass jug adopts an eagle mouth spout, pouring naturally and smoothly; the widened and thickened handle is anti-scalding and easy to hold.
【Easy Cleaning】The large diameter allows your hands to easily reach the bottom to clean the water jug, and it is dishwasher safe.

【Exquisite Appearance】The glass jug is designed with squama, which is exquisite and beautiful, not only can be used as tableware, but also can be used as home decoration; the water jug comes with exquisite packaging, it is a perfect gift for family and friends!

【Please Note】This product is made of glass, which may be damaged during shipping. If you find the glass jug with lid damaged or unsatisfactory after you receive it, please send us a message via Amazon for a replacement.
